name: NutsForWinter
description: Nuts For Winter is an adorable and high-quality physics-based game that offers hours of fun and challenge. With its charming visuals and engaging mechanics, it provides a delightful experience for players of all ages. The game automatically scales to fit your devices screen, ensuring a seamless and immersive experience on any device. Perfect for anyone looking to enjoy a playful yet challenging adventure!
instructions: Mouse click or tap to play
